_source: Wittgenstein Centre for Demography and Global Human Capital (2023). Education Level Projections 2025–2035. Population aged 25+.
_note: Shares are proportions (0–1) of adult population (25+) by highest educational attainment. Projections use SSP2 (middle-of-road) scenario.

ghana.name: Ghana
ghana.insight: Upper secondary attainment is projected to grow by 5pp by 2035 — but tertiary remains low, constraining access to formal sector jobs without skills bridge programs.

bangladesh.name: Bangladesh
bangladesh.insight: No-education share falls sharply, but upper secondary still reaches only 23% by 2035 — a skills gap that RMG sector automation will widen significantly without intervention.
